comments.comment: Looks solid depth to this field. INVINCIBLE LOVER in the money last start running second at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level, looks a sure thing. SMOKE SCREEN just missed as favourite last start at Ballarat when resuming and drawn the rails, looks threatening. CALIFORNIA FLYER in the money last start running third at Terang when resuming and gets the blinkers on for the first time, place claims. STERNIN faded from front position to finish just off the winner last start at Ballarat and has two placings from three runs this prep, place only.

INVINCIBLE LOVER placed last start at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level. From a good stable. Definitely the one to beat. SMOKE SCREEN narrowly beaten when heavily backed last start at Ballarat when fresh and Declan Bates rides yet again for Ciaron Maher. Drawn perfectly. Must respect. STERNIN has genuine early speed and has two placings from three runs this prep. Cannot rule out.

entryConditions.description: Maiden Set Weights or WFA flat

selections.comments: Found a nice spot behind the speed but did little in the run home 5.4L at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw over 1200m Soft 5. Raced midfield but couldn't bridge the gap when fourth 4.8L at Southside Pakenham Mdn-Sw over 1200m Synthetic.

competitor.name: Absolute Power
competitor.owner: Miss L G Proctor & Mrs L Tolson

selectionComments.comments: Resumes after a 27 week spell and looks up to a race in town. From a good stable. Hard to have.
Back after 27 week break. Finished five lengths off the winner last start at Pakenham Synthetic and looks up to a race in town. Hard to get enthused.

forms.videoComment: 5th rails. Off fence t. Boxed on steadily to line
5th 2W. Eased 3W t. Boxed on steadily to line

selections.gearChanges: Blinkers FIRST TIME, Tongue Tie FIRST TIME
selections.comments: Nicely positioned behind the leaders but failed to finish off 17.6L at Southside Cranbourne Mdn-Sw over 1400m Soft 7. Led, tried hard but was ultimately outclassed into third placing 2.8L at Terang Mdn-Sw over 1206m. Second-up.

competitor.owner: Mrs K Flaherty, Baxter Lodge (Mgr: A E Jacobs), Baxter Lodge Racing No 1 (Mgr: A E Jacobs), S A Hounihan, Wyuna Racing (Mgr: J Ryan), Rich Breeze (Mgr: S Lockie), A J Johnson, S Uebergang, K J Crouch, B J Moloney, K Sedgwick, R A Leemon & Get Punted Racing (Mgr: G L Rodwell)

selectionComments.comments: In the money last start running third at Terang when resuming and gets the blinkers on for the first time. Has a lot of early speed. A winning chance.
In the money last start running third at Terang when resuming and gets the blinkers on for the first time. Racing back in town. Should go well.

forms.videoComment: Led tt and into strt. Fought hard right to line but no match final 100m.
3rd 2W. Popped 3W trying to stick with ldr app t. K-up in strt.

event.nameNews: Renew Your Southside Membership Now Maiden Plate

forms.videoComment: 2nd 2W tt. Loomed top strt & kept fighting hard but was overpowered final 125m

selections.comments: Back worse than midfield and never came into the race fifth 3.7L at Moe Mdn-Sw over 1017m Soft 7. Flew to the line in an impressive gallop for second but got too far back 0.2L at Wangaratta Mdn-Sw over 1000m. Threat.

competitor.name: Spirit Of Gaia
competitor.owner: K G Williams & Mrs D O Williams

selectionComments.comments: Only just missed in driving finish last start at Wangaratta when first up but steps up to company at a metro level. From a strong camp. Must be considered.
Came on strong when just beaten last start at Wangaratta when fresh but looks up to metro grade. From a strong camp. Must be considered.

forms.videoComment: WTMF or MF 2-3WC between runners. Held-up 400-200m. Eased clear 4W 2.5L and wound-up gamely. Missed.
forms.videoNote: Race best closing splits striking traffic.

forms.videoComment: 7th 2W tt. Clear top strt & made some ground but was never a winning hope
3rd 3WNC tt. Loomed storngly top strt & kept fighting hard but was no match final 150m
forms.stewardsReport: Wide throughout. Laid in in straight.

selections.comments: Sire a dual stakes winning juvenile that went on to be a dual G1 winner at 3 before a breathtaking victory in the G1 Darley Sprint at 4.

competitor.name: Exit Strategy
competitor.owner: Rosemont Stud Pty Ltd (Mgr: A P Mithen), K G B A M P C (Mgr: I Woolley), I Woolley & C Upstone

selectionComments.comments: First start and from a good stable. Market as guide.
On debut and from a strong camp. Market as guide.

selections.comments: Tracked into the race nicely from behind the speed and just out played fourth 2.1L at Southside Pakenham Mdn-Sw over 1100m. Raced behind the leaders and ran on nicely for second 8L at Southside Cranbourne Mdn-Sw over 1000m.

competitor.name: Invincible Lover
competitor.owner: Ridgeport (Mgr: E S Guagliardo) & M McNeil

selectionComments.comments: In the money last start running second at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level. Drops in weight. Bad luck looks the only danger.
Placed last start at Cranbourne and has two placings from three runs this prep at metro level. From a good stable. Definitely the one to beat.

forms.videoComment: 4th 2W tt. Tried hard but was no match for smart winner final 200m
O/L tt. Line of 3 into long strt. Revved-up 250m but unable to get away. Overhauled wider late.
forms.videoNote: Fair with comfy run on pace.

posts.title: 2026-03-04 Caulfield Heath RR8. Remembering Miss Finland 11. Madame Maserati

realtimeInsightAcf.description: We were with her last start when she ran unplaced at Caulfield over 1000m behind Castellar. She was ‘slow out 2 lengths’ according to the Stewards report yet ran home the best last 800m of the meeting. Her previous start was at Flemington when fifth to Gallant Son over 1000m  beaten   1 ½ lengths. That day she ran the best last 800m, 600m and 400m and the third best last 200m of the day. Scratched from Morphetville on Saturday last and gets out to 1100m. She has been supported $34 into $12.

realtimeInsightAnalyst.name: Laurie Sainsbury
realtimeInsightAnalyst.description: After being introduced to punting at an early age, Laurie has progressed through a wide range of roles in the industry. Including providing prices for Melbourne races as well as tipping selections on 2KY and Racing to the Max on 2SM and finally joining Racenet as its resident Melbourne tipster. Dubbed ‘longshot Laurie’, he identifies sectional performers that are strong late, horses that map well and have performed previously in good class races and also incorporates trials and jump outs. Over the years Laurie has built a reputation of finding roughies that give us a run for our money.
